title: Session 20 — Darkpass Destruction
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The bag-and-flight-ale infiltration of Darkpass Manor — Root's Misty Step failed (Mr. Spells: "Our business is over"), and Brolin and Eira killed him, Eira obliterating the body.**

# What happened
- The infiltration: everyone in the bag; **[[pc-felson|Felson]] invisible + flight ale** carried them over the walls and through the sleeping guild, in through [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s old window into **Darkpass Manor**.
- [[cumb]] picked [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s office lock — a **hidden journal** triggered a trap and woke Root.
- The confrontation: Felson **transformed into a shadow-copy of [[pc-varen|Varen]]'s Stalker**, rattling Root.
- A **fireball blew a hole in the manor**, waking the town.
- Root talked — claimed his family was dead, mocked Brolin, boasted of **access to a hidden source of powerful magic** — then tried to **Misty Step away. The spell failed.**
- Only Felson saw why: **Mr. Spells stood nearby — "Our business is over" — and vanished.**
- Root was knocked unconscious. **Brolin and [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]] finished it; Eira obliterated the body.**
- They took his weapons and armor, dove into the bag, and escaped as the guild rushed the explosion.

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] Root Darkpass is dead — Brolin and Eira finished it; the body obliterated.
- [x] Mr. Spells' end of the deal — his presence broke Root's escape; "Our business is over" (only Felson saw).
- Root's boast: **access to a hidden source of powerful magic**.
- Root's **hidden journal** — the trap that woke him.

# Threads
[[root-darkpass]] · [[eira-cavernborn]] · [[pc-brolin]] · [[cumb]]
